title: Senior Teacher - Arena Animation - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Arena Animation - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Arena Animation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Arena Animation:
Arena Animation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation!
